## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Adlumin and fwd.digital for AI-driven content marketing and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content creation and marketing services, producing high-volume, quality content (50-100k words/month) at $9k/month](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Adlumin is refining brand messaging, considering a move to Webflow, and expanding globally; seeking ways to drive demand and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to a follow-up meeting with Adlumin's marketing team to discuss a potential 3-month pilot for Q4](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's AI-Driven Content Marketing Approach

  - [Utilizes AI workflows coupled with human expertise to create and optimize content](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Offers end-to-end service including strategy, SEO, content creation, and CMS management](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Focuses on rapid content production (10-15 articles/week) and continuous optimization](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Pricing: $9,000/month for up to 100,000 words, equating to about $0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Adlumin's Current Marketing Situation

  - [Inconsistent messaging across website due to company evolution](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Shifting focus from managed services to platform-centric approach](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Planning website refinement and relaunch for next year](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Expanding globally and aiming to present as a more international company](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Seeking to drive demand through website conversions (demos, meetings)](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

### Potential Collaboration Discussion

  - [fwd.digital could replace or augment Adlumin's current SEO contractor](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Possibility of a 3-month pilot program for Q4 to demonstrate value](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [fwd.digital can adapt to Adlumin's evolving messaging and brand refinement](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Discussion on handling existing content updates and solution-based materials](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

### AI Integration and Leadership Insights

  - [Marcel emphasized the importance of business leaders becoming "AI-native"](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Suggested 100-1000 hours of investment to retool oneself and team for AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Highlighted the need for bridging the gap between AI technologists and business operators](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send additional presentation materials on AI integration for businesses](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Vikram to introduce Marcel to Adlumin's marketing team (Head of Comms, Head of Product Marketing, Marketing Ops)](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Tuesday, 9:00-9:45 AM (Marcel's time) with Adlumin's team](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
  - [Explore potential 3-month pilot program for Q4](https://fathom.video/share/hUhaf7w8-1smR4csNyQYtpFZh65-Qn7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - Consider Adlumin's need for AirOps platform access in the future as team becomes more AI-proficient
